TestCase z17Change(TestCase t1) {
    TestCase follow_case = t1;
    // --- Memory handling code generated based on the rule ---
    int* follow_case_a = (int*)malloc(t1.n * sizeof(int));
    memcpy(follow_case_a, t1.a, t1.n * sizeof(int));
    follow_case.a = follow_case_a;
    // ------------------------------------
    
    // Defensive code generated based on rule (a) to prevent errors when n < 2
    if (follow_case.n < 2) {
        // Not enough elements to perform a swap, return replica directly
        return follow_case;
    }
    
    // Specific operation code: swap two random elements
    int idx1 = rand() % follow_case.n;
    int idx2 = rand() % follow_case.n;
    int temp = follow_case.a[idx1];
    follow_case.a[idx1] = follow_case.a[idx2];
    follow_case.a[idx2] = temp;
    
    return follow_case;
}
